violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. -Cook without beard net.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items in reach-in cooler without dates.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Shelving, handles on equipment needs to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. - Hand wash station on cook line found dirty.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
